mission.name: The Empty Statement
mission.description: An IAM role exists for a reporting app, but its inline policy only allows s3:ListBucket — it cannot read any objects.
mission.objective: Update the inline policy on role report-reader-role so it allows s3:GetObject on the mission bucket objects.

mission.name: Wrong Side of the Law
mission.description: The IAM policy for an upload service explicitly denies writes to the mission bucket, so PutObject requests always fail.
mission.objective: Replace the deny statement with an allow statement for s3:PutObject on the uploads bucket.

mission.name: The Misspelled Gate
mission.description: Policy action has typo: `"s3:GetObjcet"` — IAM rejects all GetObject calls
mission.objective: Fix the typo to `"s3:GetObject"`

mission.name: The Locked Vault
mission.description: Policy grants `s3:GetObject` on `arn:aws:s3:::wrong-bucket/*` but app reads from `mission-bucket`
mission.objective: Fix the resource ARN to point to the correct bucket

mission.name: The Bare Role
mission.description: IAM role exists and is attached to Lambda but has zero policies — all calls denied
mission.objective: Attach a managed policy or put an inline policy granting required permissions

mission.name: Trust Nobody
mission.description: Role trust policy has wrong account ID in Principal — `sts:AssumeRole` fails
mission.objective: Fix the Principal to the correct account ID (`000000000000` in LocalStack)

mission.name: Wrong Service
mission.description: Lambda execution role has `"Service": "ec2.amazonaws.com"` in trust policy — Lambda can't assume it
mission.objective: Change service principal to `"lambda.amazonaws.com"`

mission.name: The Blocked Handoff
mission.description: IAM user can create Lambda but can't assign an execution role — missing `iam:PassRole`
mission.objective: Add `iam:PassRole` permission on the target role to the user policy

mission.name: The Orphan User
mission.description: IAM user exists but is in no group and has no policies attached
mission.objective: Create a group with a policy, add the user to the group

mission.name: The Empty Club
mission.description: User is in a group but the group has no policies — all actions denied
mission.objective: Attach a policy to the group

mission.name: The Bad Condition
mission.description: Policy has a condition block using wrong key: `"aws:sourceIp"` when it should be `"aws:SourceAccount"` — condition never matches
mission.objective: Fix the condition key to the correct one

mission.name: Almost Right
mission.description: Policy condition uses `StringEquals` for a value that requires wildcard matching — use `StringLike`
mission.objective: Change condition operator from `StringEquals` to `StringLike`

mission.name: Time Traveler
mission.description: IAM policy document missing `"Version": "2012-10-17"` — policy variables don't resolve
mission.objective: Add the Version field to the policy document

mission.name: Double Trouble
mission.description: Inline policy grants S3 access but a second inline policy explicitly Denies it — Deny wins
mission.objective: Remove or fix the conflicting Deny policy

mission.name: Can't Switch Hats
mission.description: User policy is missing `sts:AssumeRole` — cannot switch to the target role
mission.objective: Add `sts:AssumeRole` on the target role ARN

mission.name: The Missing Secret Handshake
mission.description: Role trust policy requires `sts:ExternalId` condition but caller doesn't provide it — AssumeRole denied
mission.objective: Provide the correct ExternalId when calling `aws sts assume-role`

mission.name: The Invisible Ceiling
mission.description: IAM role has a permission boundary that blocks S3 access even though the identity policy allows it
mission.objective: Update or remove the permission boundary to allow the required actions

mission.name: Scope Creep
mission.description: Policy uses specific object ARN `arn:aws:s3:::bucket/specific.txt` but app accesses multiple objects — only that file is allowed
mission.objective: Change resource to `arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*`

mission.name: The Wrong Path
mission.description: IAM user exists at path `/ops/` but policy ARN references `/dev/` — condition on path fails
mission.objective: Fix the role/user path or the policy path condition

mission.name: The Bloated Policy
mission.description: Inline policy exceeds 2,048 character limit — IAM rejects the PutRolePolicy call
mission.objective: Refactor: extract into a managed policy and attach it

mission.name: No Bucket, No Service
mission.description: The application expects an S3 bucket named mission-bucket, but it does not exist in the local AWS environment.
mission.objective: Create the missing S3 bucket so the application can start storing objects.

mission.name: Keep Out
mission.description: Bucket exists and has an object but GetObject is denied — bucket policy blocks all access
mission.objective: Fix bucket policy to allow `s3:GetObject` for the required principal

mission.name: Read-Only Trap
mission.description: Bucket policy only allows `s3:GetObject` — PutObject is denied
mission.objective: Add `s3:PutObject` to the bucket policy

mission.name: Lost History
mission.description: Application expects versioned objects but versioning is disabled — previous versions unreachable
mission.objective: Enable versioning: `aws s3api put-bucket-versioning`

mission.name: Frozen in Time
mission.description: Versioning is Suspended (not Enabled) — new versions are not created
mission.objective: Change versioning status from `Suspended` to `Enabled`

mission.name: The Force Field
mission.description: Bucket policy grants public read but `BlockPublicPolicy` is true — policy silently rejected
mission.objective: Disable public access block: `aws s3api put-public-access-block`

mission.name: The CORS Complaint
mission.description: Web application can't fetch objects — CORS configuration is missing entirely
mission.objective: Add a CORS configuration via `aws s3api put-bucket-cors`

mission.name: Wrong Domain Allowed
mission.description: CORS is configured but allows `https://wrong-app.com` instead of `https://myapp.com`
mission.objective: Fix the AllowedOrigins value in the CORS rule

mission.name: Eternal Storage
mission.description: Lifecycle rule exists to expire objects after 30 days but prefix is `logs/` while objects are under `app-logs/` — objects never expire
mission.objective: Fix the prefix in the lifecycle rule

mission.name: Incomplete Uploads Pile Up
mission.description: Multipart uploads are being abandoned and accumulating cost — no lifecycle rule to abort them
mission.objective: Add lifecycle rule: abort incomplete multipart uploads after 7 days

mission.name: Silent Arrivals
mission.description: Lambda function should trigger on object upload — S3 event notification not configured
mission.objective: Add event notification: `aws s3api put-bucket-notification-configuration`

mission.name: Wrong Trigger
mission.description: S3 event notification is configured but targets `s3:ObjectRemoved:*` instead of `s3:ObjectCreated:*`
mission.objective: Fix the event type in the notification configuration

mission.name: Plaintext Exposure
mission.description: Bucket has no default encryption — objects stored unencrypted
mission.objective: Enable default SSE-S3 encryption: `aws s3api put-bucket-encryption`

mission.name: The Broken Gate
mission.description: Bucket policy JSON has a syntax error (missing closing bracket) — policy rejected
mission.objective: Fix the JSON syntax in the bucket policy

mission.name: Public by Accident
mission.description: Bucket ACL is set to `public-read` — all objects are publicly readable
mission.objective: Change ACL to `private`: `aws s3api put-bucket-acl --acl private`

mission.name: Silent Website
mission.description: Static website hosting is disabled — requests return `NoSuchWebsiteConfiguration`
mission.objective: Enable static website hosting with index.html and error.html

mission.name: No Paper Trail
mission.description: S3 server access logging is disabled — access logs not being collected
mission.objective: Enable logging: `aws s3api put-bucket-logging`

mission.name: Too Flexible
mission.description: Object lock is in `GOVERNANCE` mode but compliance requirements need `COMPLIANCE` mode
mission.objective: Change retention mode to `COMPLIANCE` on the object

mission.name: Expensive Archive
mission.description: Frequently accessed objects are set to `GLACIER` storage class — retrieval takes hours
mission.objective: Change storage class to `STANDARD` via copy with metadata replacement

mission.name: Unexpected Bills
mission.description: Bucket has `requester-pays` enabled — callers are being charged unexpectedly
mission.objective: Disable requester pays: `aws s3api put-bucket-request-payment --payer BucketOwner`

mission.name: No Function Found
mission.description: Invocation fails — Lambda function `mission-function` doesn't exist
mission.objective: Deploy the function using `aws lambda create-function`

mission.name: Deprecated Engine
mission.description: Function uses runtime `python3.6` (deprecated/unsupported) — invocation fails
mission.objective: Update runtime to `python3.11`: `aws lambda update-function-configuration`

mission.name: The Missing Door
mission.description: Function is deployed but handler is `main.handler` — file is actually `index.py` with function `lambda_handler`
mission.objective: Fix handler to `index.lambda_handler`

mission.name: The Roleless Function
mission.description: Function has no execution role set — invocation rejected
mission.objective: Create an IAM role with Lambda trust policy and assign it to the function

mission.name: Wrong Trust
mission.description: Execution role exists but trust policy has `ec2.amazonaws.com` instead of `lambda.amazonaws.com`
mission.objective: Fix the trust relationship on the role

mission.name: The Blank Config
mission.description: Function code reads `os.environ['DATABASE_URL']` but the env var is not set — KeyError on invocation
mission.objective: Add the environment variable via `aws lambda update-function-configuration --environment`

mission.name: Three Seconds and Out
mission.description: Function needs 30 seconds to process but timeout is 3s — always times out
mission.objective: Increase timeout to 60s: `aws lambda update-function-configuration --timeout 60`

mission.name: Out of Memory
mission.description: Function crashes with memory error — configured at 128MB, needs 512MB
mission.objective: Increase memory: `aws lambda update-function-configuration --memory-size 512`

mission.name: The Throttled Function
mission.description: Function has reserved concurrency set to `0` — all invocations are throttled immediately
mission.objective: Remove or increase reserved concurrency: `aws lambda put-function-concurrency`

mission.name: Lost on Failure
mission.description: Async invocation fails silently — no dead-letter queue configured
mission.objective: Configure DLQ: `aws lambda update-function-configuration --dead-letter-config`

mission.name: Missing Dependency
mission.description: Function references a Lambda layer ARN that doesn't exist — init fails
mission.objective: Create the layer and update the function to use the correct ARN

mission.name: The Silent Upload
mission.description: S3 bucket receives files but Lambda is never triggered — event source mapping missing
mission.objective: Add S3 notification configuration pointing to the Lambda function

mission.name: Watching the Wrong Door
mission.description: S3 trigger is configured but points to `wrong-bucket` instead of `uploads-bucket`
mission.objective: Fix the event source to point to the correct bucket

mission.name: Permission Denied by Lambda
mission.description: S3 configured to invoke Lambda but Lambda resource policy doesn't allow S3 service
mission.objective: Add Lambda permission: `aws lambda add-permission` for `s3.amazonaws.com` principal

mission.name: The Ghost Alias
mission.description: Lambda alias `production` points to version `5` which was deleted — invocations fail
mission.objective: Update alias to point to an existing version or `$LATEST`

mission.name: Stranded in VPC
mission.description: Lambda has VPC config but `SubnetIds` is empty — deployment fails
mission.objective: Add the correct subnet IDs to VPC configuration

mission.name: Unguarded VPC
mission.description: Lambda VPC config has subnets but no security groups — cannot configure network interface
mission.objective: Add at least one security group to the VPC configuration

mission.name: The Locked Door
mission.description: Lambda function URL is configured with `AuthType: AWS_IAM` — public HTTP requests return 403
mission.objective: Change AuthType to `NONE` for public access: `aws lambda update-function-url-config`

mission.name: No Table, No Data
mission.description: Application fails — DynamoDB table `MissionTable` doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create the table with the correct key schema via `aws dynamodb create-table`

mission.name: Type Mismatch
mission.description: Table's hash key `userId` is defined as type `N` (Number) but application sends String values — all writes rejected
mission.objective: Delete and recreate table with hash key type `S` (String)

mission.name: One Key Short
mission.description: Table has only a hash key but the application queries with both hash + sort key — query fails
mission.objective: Recreate table with both partition key and sort key

mission.name: No Index, No Query
mission.description: Application queries a GSI named `email-index` but the index doesn't exist on the table
mission.objective: Add the GSI via table update: `aws dynamodb update-table`

mission.name: Wrong Index Key
mission.description: GSI `email-index` exists but is keyed on `username` instead of `email` — queries return nothing
mission.objective: Delete the wrong GSI and create a new one with the correct key attribute

mission.name: Out of Capacity
mission.description: Table is in PROVISIONED mode with 1 RCU/WCU — application load causes constant throttling
mission.objective: Increase provisioned capacity or switch to PAY_PER_REQUEST

mission.name: Provisionless Pain
mission.description: Application has spiky unpredictable traffic but table is in PROVISIONED mode with no auto-scaling
mission.objective: Change billing mode to `PAY_PER_REQUEST`

mission.name: Eternal Records
mission.description: Application expects expired records to be cleaned up automatically — TTL is not enabled
mission.objective: Enable TTL on the `expiresAt` attribute: `aws dynamodb update-time-to-live`

mission.name: The Silent Table
mission.description: Lambda should process every table change — DynamoDB Streams are disabled
mission.objective: Enable streams: `aws dynamodb update-table --stream-specification StreamEnabled=true`

mission.name: Local Index Gap
mission.description: Application queries with a Local Secondary Index `status-index` that doesn't exist — LSI must be created at table creation time
mission.objective: Delete and recreate table with the LSI included

mission.name: Half the Picture
mission.description: GSI `category-index` has `ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY` but application needs all attributes
mission.objective: Delete the GSI and recreate it with `ProjectionType: ALL`

mission.name: No Safety Net
mission.description: Compliance requires Point-in-Time Recovery — it's disabled on the table
mission.objective: Enable PITR: `aws dynamodb update-continuous-backups`

mission.name: The Overprotective Guard
mission.description: PutItem has a ConditionExpression `attribute_not_exists(id)` that prevents updating an existing item
mission.objective: Remove or change the condition expression to allow the update

mission.name: Reserved Words
mission.description: Attribute name `status` is a DynamoDB reserved word — query using it as an expression attribute fails
mission.objective: Use Expression Attribute Names (`#s = :val`) in the query

mission.name: Full Table Scan
mission.description: Application uses `Scan` on a large table with a filter — extremely slow and expensive
mission.objective: Identify the proper key schema and rewrite as a `Query` operation

mission.name: No Queue
mission.description: Application sends messages but queue `mission-queue` doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create the SQS queue: `aws sqs create-queue`

mission.name: Wrong Address
mission.description: Application is configured with an incorrect queue URL — messages going nowhere
mission.objective: Retrieve the correct URL: `aws sqs get-queue-url` and update the config

mission.name: Message Ghost
mission.description: Visibility timeout is 5 seconds — workers take 30s to process, messages become visible again and are re-processed
mission.objective: Increase visibility timeout to 60s: `aws sqs set-queue-attributes`

mission.name: No Safety Net
mission.description: Queue has no Dead Letter Queue — failed messages disappear after max receive count
mission.objective: Create a DLQ and configure redrive policy on the source queue

mission.name: Lost DLQ
mission.description: DLQ is configured but the ARN points to a non-existent queue — redrive fails silently
mission.objective: Fix the DLQ ARN in the redrive policy

mission.name: Zero Tolerance
mission.description: `maxReceiveCount` in redrive policy is set to `0` — messages go to DLQ immediately on first receive
mission.objective: Set `maxReceiveCount` to a reasonable value (e.g., 3)

mission.name: Order Ignored
mission.description: Application requires ordered message processing (FIFO) but a Standard queue was created
mission.objective: Create a new FIFO queue (`.fifo` suffix) and update application config

mission.name: Duplicate Messages
mission.description: FIFO queue exists but `ContentBasedDeduplication` is disabled and application doesn't provide `MessageDeduplicationId` — duplicates processed
mission.objective: Enable content-based deduplication on the FIFO queue

mission.name: SNS Can't Send
mission.description: SNS topic configured to deliver to SQS queue but queue policy doesn't allow SNS to send — messages lost
mission.objective: Add queue policy allowing SNS service to `sqs:SendMessage`

mission.name: No Topic
mission.description: Application publishes to SNS topic `mission-topic` that doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create the SNS topic: `aws sns create-topic`

mission.name: Topic, No Subscribers
mission.description: SNS topic exists but has no subscriptions — published messages go nowhere
mission.objective: Subscribe the SQS queue to the topic: `aws sns subscribe`

mission.name: Wrong Endpoint
mission.description: SNS subscription exists but targets wrong SQS queue ARN
mission.objective: Delete and re-create subscription with correct endpoint ARN

mission.name: The Silence Filter
mission.description: SNS subscription has a filter policy `{"eventType": ["nonexistent"]}` — no messages pass through
mission.objective: Fix or remove the filter policy to allow relevant message attributes

mission.name: Double-Wrapped
mission.description: Lambda expects raw message body but SNS wraps it in an envelope — JSON parsing fails
mission.objective: Enable `RawMessageDelivery` on the SNS-to-SQS subscription

mission.name: Message Size Exceeded
mission.description: Application sends 300KB messages — SQS limit is 256KB — sends fail
mission.objective: Use the SQS Extended Client pattern: store payload in S3, send S3 reference in queue

mission.name: Where Are My Logs?
mission.description: Lambda function writes logs but log group `/aws/lambda/mission-function` doesn't exist — logs dropped
mission.objective: Create the log group: `aws logs create-log-group`

mission.name: Infinite Log Growth
mission.description: Log group exists but retention is set to `Never` — logs accumulate indefinitely
mission.objective: Set retention policy to 30 days: `aws logs put-retention-policy`

mission.name: Stream Doesn't Exist
mission.description: Application tries to write to a specific log stream that doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create the log stream: `aws logs create-log-stream`

mission.name: Filter Catches Nothing
mission.description: Metric filter exists to count ERROR logs but pattern is `[ERROR]` when logs use `ERROR:` format
mission.objective: Fix the filter pattern to match actual log format

mission.name: Silent Failure
mission.description: Error metric is being published but no CloudWatch alarm is configured — nobody gets alerted
mission.objective: Create a CloudWatch alarm on the error metric

mission.name: Always Firing
mission.description: Alarm threshold is `0` — alarm fires constantly even with zero errors
mission.objective: Set a reasonable threshold (e.g., `5`) for the alarm

mission.name: The Mute Alarm
mission.description: Alarm fires (changes state to ALARM) but no action is configured — nobody is notified
mission.objective: Add SNS topic ARN to alarm actions: `aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm`

mission.name: Backwards Alarm
mission.description: Alarm uses `LessThanThreshold` to detect high error counts — should be `GreaterThanThreshold`
mission.objective: Fix the comparison operator on the alarm

mission.name: Too Granular
mission.description: Alarm evaluation period is 10s but the metric is published every 5 minutes — alarm never evaluates
mission.objective: Fix period to match metric publish interval (300 seconds)

mission.name: Query Crash
mission.description: CloudWatch Logs Insights query has a syntax error — query fails to execute
mission.objective: Fix the query syntax (check `fields`, `filter`, `stats` commands)

mission.name: Rule Is Off
mission.description: EventBridge rule exists but its state is `DISABLED` — no events are delivered
mission.objective: Enable the rule: `aws events enable-rule`

mission.name: Wrong Destination
mission.description: EventBridge rule has the wrong Lambda ARN as target
mission.objective: Update the rule target to the correct Lambda ARN

mission.name: Mismatched Pattern
mission.description: EventBridge rule has `"source": ["aws.ec3"]` (typo) instead of `"aws.ec2"` — events never match
mission.objective: Fix the event pattern

mission.name: Logic Flipped
mission.description: Composite alarm uses `ALARM(alarm-a) AND NOT ALARM(alarm-b)` but should trigger when both are in ALARM
mission.objective: Fix the composite alarm rule expression

mission.name: No Permission to Write
mission.description: Lambda execution role is missing `logs:CreateLogStream` and `logs:PutLogEvents` permissions
mission.objective: Add CloudWatch Logs permissions to the Lambda execution role

mission.name: No Security Group
mission.description: Instance launch fails — no security group specified and no default SG exists in VPC
mission.objective: Create a security group and reference it in the instance config

mission.name: The Closed Door
mission.description: Security group exists but has no inbound rules — all inbound traffic blocked (port 22, 80, 443)
mission.objective: Add inbound rules for the required ports

mission.name: Port Mismatch
mission.description: Security group allows port 8080 inbound but application runs on port 80
mission.objective: Fix the security group inbound rule to allow port 80

mission.name: Too Restrictive CIDR
mission.description: Security group inbound rule has CIDR `0.0.0.0/32` (single IP) instead of `0.0.0.0/0`
mission.objective: Fix the CIDR block on the inbound rule

mission.name: No Way Out
mission.description: Security group has a custom outbound rule that blocks all egress — app can't reach external APIs
mission.objective: Remove the blocking egress rule or add an allow-all egress rule

mission.name: No Network
mission.description: Application requires a VPC with specific CIDR block — only the default VPC exists
mission.objective: Create a new VPC: `aws ec2 create-vpc --cidr-block 10.0.0.0/16`

mission.name: No Subnets
mission.description: VPC exists but has no subnets — instances cannot be launched
mission.objective: Create public and private subnets in the VPC

mission.name: Internet Gap
mission.description: Internet gateway exists but is not attached to the VPC — no internet access
mission.objective: Attach the IGW to the VPC: `aws ec2 attach-internet-gateway`

mission.name: No Route to Internet
mission.description: VPC, subnet, and IGW exist but route table has no route to `0.0.0.0/0` via IGW
mission.objective: Add route: `aws ec2 create-route --destination-cidr-block 0.0.0.0/0 --gateway-id igw-xxx`

mission.name: Route Table Orphan
mission.description: Route table has correct routes but is not associated with the subnet
mission.objective: Associate route table with subnet: `aws ec2 associate-route-table`

mission.name: Firewall in the Way
mission.description: Network ACL has a DENY rule for port 80 with lower rule number than the ALLOW rule — HTTP blocked
mission.objective: Fix NACL rule order (lower rule number = higher priority) or remove the DENY rule

mission.name: EC2 Can't Talk to AWS
mission.description: Instance needs to call AWS APIs (SSM, S3) but has no IAM instance profile
mission.objective: Create instance profile with IAM role and associate it with the instance

mission.name: No SSH Key
mission.description: Instance launched without a key pair — SSH access impossible
mission.objective: Create a key pair and re-launch instance with it

mission.name: Invisible Instance
mission.description: Instance in public subnet but `AssociatePublicIpAddress` is false — no public IP
mission.objective: Enable auto-assign public IP on the subnet or allocate an Elastic IP

mission.name: Cluster Can't Talk
mission.description: Auto Scaling group instances need to communicate with each other — security group missing a self-referencing rule
mission.objective: Add an inbound rule referencing the security group ID as source

mission.name: Parse Error
mission.description: CFN template has a YAML indentation error — stack creation fails immediately
mission.objective: Fix the YAML syntax error in the template

mission.name: Unknown Resource
mission.description: Template has `AWS::S3::Bukcet` (typo) instead of `AWS::S3::Bucket` — CREATE_FAILED
mission.objective: Fix the resource type name

mission.name: Missing Requirement
mission.description: `AWS::SQS::Queue` resource is missing required `QueueName` — wait, QueueName is optional. `AWS::IAM::Role` missing `AssumeRolePolicyDocument` (required)
mission.objective: Add the missing required property

mission.name: No Default Value
mission.description: Template has a Parameter with no Default and no value passed at deploy — create fails
mission.objective: Either add a Default value or pass the parameter at stack creation

mission.name: Type Collision
mission.description: Parameter declared as `Type: Number` but value passed is a string — validation error
mission.objective: Fix parameter type or the value being passed

mission.name: Missing Reference
mission.description: `!Ref MyBucket` references a logical ID `MyBucket` that doesn't exist in the template
mission.objective: Add the missing resource or fix the reference name

mission.name: Wrong Attribute
mission.description: `!GetAtt MyFunction.Arn` should be `!GetAtt MyFunction.FunctionArn` — depends on resource type
mission.objective: Fix the attribute name in the GetAtt reference

mission.name: Going in Circles
mission.description: Resource A has `DependsOn: B` and B has `DependsOn: A` — circular dependency error
mission.objective: Break the circular dependency by removing one DependsOn or restructuring resources

mission.name: Stack Stuck
mission.description: Stack is in `ROLLBACK_COMPLETE` state from a previous failed create — cannot update
mission.objective: Delete the stack and recreate it (stacks in ROLLBACK_COMPLETE can't be updated)

mission.name: Name Conflict
mission.description: Two stacks both export a value with the same name `SharedBucketName` — second stack fails
mission.objective: Change the export name in one of the stacks to be unique

mission.name: Broken Cross-Stack Link
mission.description: `!ImportValue SharedBucketName` — but the export is actually named `mission-SharedBucketName`
mission.objective: Fix the ImportValue key to match the exact export name

mission.name: Wrong Condition Logic
mission.description: Condition `IsProduction: !Equals [!Ref Env, dev]` — logic is inverted (true when env is dev, not prod)
mission.objective: Fix the condition expression

mission.name: Dangerous Delete
mission.description: S3 bucket resource has no `DeletionPolicy` (defaults to Delete) — stack deletion will wipe data
mission.objective: Add `DeletionPolicy: Retain` to the bucket resource

mission.name: Policy Lock
mission.description: Stack update policy prevents changes to the S3 bucket resource — update fails
mission.objective: Update or remove the stack policy: `aws cloudformation set-stack-policy`

mission.name: Missing Map Entry
mission.description: `!FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref AWS::Region, AMI]` — the `us-east-1` key is missing from the Mappings section
mission.objective: Add the missing key to the Mappings section

mission.name: SAM Template Rejected
mission.description: Template uses `AWS::Serverless::Function` but is missing `Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31`
mission.objective: Add the Transform declaration at the template root

mission.name: Reality Diverged
mission.description: Stack resources were manually modified outside CFN — stack has drifted
mission.objective: Detect drift: `aws cloudformation detect-stack-drift`, then reconcile by updating the stack

mission.name: Nested Stack 404
mission.description: Nested stack references a template URL in S3 that doesn't exist or has wrong path
mission.objective: Upload the template to S3 and fix the TemplateURL property

mission.name: No Key
mission.description: Application tries to encrypt using KMS key alias `alias/mission-key` — key doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create a KMS key and alias: `aws kms create-key` + `aws kms create-alias`

mission.name: Disabled Key
mission.description: KMS key exists but is disabled — encrypt/decrypt operations fail with `DisabledException`
mission.objective: Enable the key: `aws kms enable-key`

mission.name: No Key Permission
mission.description: KMS key exists and is enabled but key policy doesn't grant the IAM role permission to use it
mission.objective: Update the key policy to grant `kms:Encrypt`, `kms:Decrypt` to the role

mission.name: Wrong Key Name
mission.description: Application uses `alias/production-key` but key was created with alias `alias/prod-key`
mission.objective: Create the correct alias or update application config

mission.name: No Secret
mission.description: Application calls `GetSecretValue` for `mission/db-password` — secret doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create the secret: `aws secretsmanager create-secret`

mission.name: Wrong Key in JSON
mission.description: Secret exists as JSON `{"password": "abc123"}` but application reads key `db_password`
mission.objective: Update the secret value to use the correct JSON key

mission.name: Access Denied to Secret
mission.description: Secret exists but IAM role is missing `secretsmanager:GetSecretValue` permission
mission.objective: Add the required permission to the role policy

mission.name: Wrong Version
mission.description: Application pinned to a specific secret version that no longer exists (was rotated)
mission.objective: Update application to use `AWSCURRENT` stage or fix the version reference

mission.name: Stale Credentials
mission.description: Secret rotation was configured but rotation Lambda ARN is wrong — secret is never rotated
mission.objective: Fix the rotation Lambda ARN: `aws secretsmanager rotate-secret` with correct config

mission.name: Missing Config
mission.description: Application reads SSM parameter `/mission/config/db-host` — parameter doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create the parameter: `aws ssm put-parameter`

mission.name: Plaintext Secret
mission.description: SSM parameter `/mission/config/api-key` is stored as `String` type — should be `SecureString` (encrypted)
mission.objective: Delete and recreate as SecureString: `aws ssm put-parameter --type SecureString`

mission.name: Path Confusion
mission.description: Application reads `/production/db/password` but parameter was created at `/prod/db/password`
mission.objective: Create parameter at the correct path or fix the application path config

mission.name: SSM Blocked
mission.description: ECS task role is missing `ssm:GetParameter` permission — task crashes at startup
mission.objective: Add `ssm:GetParameter` and `ssm:GetParameters` to the task role

mission.name: Rotation Breaks Decrypt
mission.description: KMS key rotation was enabled but application has old key ARN hardcoded — decryption fails after rotation
mission.objective: Update application to use key alias instead of key ARN (aliases track rotation automatically)

mission.name: Credentials in Code
mission.description: Lambda function has `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` and `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` hardcoded in environment variables
mission.objective: Remove hardcoded credentials, create proper IAM execution role with required permissions

mission.name: No Cluster
mission.description: ECS service create fails — cluster `mission-cluster` doesn't exist
mission.objective: Create cluster: `aws ecs create-cluster --cluster-name mission-cluster`

mission.name: No Task Definition
mission.description: Service references task definition `mission-task` with no revision registered
mission.objective: Register the task definition: `aws ecs register-task-definition`

mission.name: Invalid Config
mission.description: Fargate task definition has CPU `256` with memory `256` — Fargate requires memory >= 512MB for 256 CPU units
mission.objective: Fix memory to a valid Fargate combination (256 CPU → 512, 1024, or 2048 MB)

mission.name: Can't Pull Image
mission.description: Task fails to start — no `executionRoleArn` set, so ECS can't pull the ECR image or write logs
mission.objective: Create execution role with `AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy` and attach it

mission.name: App Can't Access AWS
mission.description: Task starts but application inside container can't read from S3 — task role has no S3 permission
mission.objective: Add S3 read permissions to the task IAM role

mission.name: No Image Found
mission.description: Task definition references ECR image that doesn't exist — task fails to pull
mission.objective: Push a valid image to ECR: `docker build`, `aws ecr get-login-password`, `docker push`

mission.name: Port Mismatch
mission.description: Task definition exposes port 8080 but load balancer target group expects port 80
mission.objective: Fix containerPort in task definition or update target group

mission.name: Zero Tasks
mission.description: Service exists but `desiredCount` is 0 — no tasks running
mission.objective: Update service: `aws ecs update-service --desired-count 2`

mission.name: App Crash at Startup
mission.description: Task starts but application crashes because required env var `APP_MODE` not in task definition
mission.objective: Add the environment variable to the task definition container config

mission.name: Secret Not Found
mission.description: Task definition references Secrets Manager ARN that doesn't exist — task fails to start
mission.objective: Fix the ARN in the `secrets` section of the task definition

mission.name: Permanently Unhealthy
mission.description: Container health check command is `CMD ["curl", "http://localhost/wrong-path"]` — always fails
mission.objective: Fix the health check path to match the actual application health endpoint

mission.name: No Logs
mission.description: Task definition uses `journald` log driver — ECS Fargate only supports `awslogs`
mission.objective: Change `logDriver` to `awslogs` and configure the `awslogs-group` option

mission.name: No Internet in Private
mission.description: Fargate task in private subnet with no NAT gateway — task can't pull image or reach AWS APIs
mission.objective: Either move to public subnet or note that NAT gateway is needed (add route via NAT)

mission.name: Locked Container
mission.description: Security group has no outbound rules — task can't pull image or call AWS services
mission.objective: Add egress rule allowing all outbound: `0.0.0.0/0`

mission.name: Can't Find Service
mission.description: Service A tries to reach Service B via DNS `service-b.local` — no Cloud Map service discovery configured
mission.objective: Set up AWS Cloud Map namespace and service, link to ECS service

mission.name: No API Exists
mission.description: REST API `mission-api` doesn't exist — client gets connection refused
mission.objective: Create the REST API: `aws apigateway create-rest-api`

mission.name: No Path Configured
mission.description: API exists but the `/items` resource path doesn't exist — 404 on all requests
mission.objective: Create the resource: `aws apigateway create-resource` with correct path part

mission.name: Wrong HTTP Method
mission.description: `POST /items` resource only has a `GET` method configured — POST returns 405
mission.objective: Add a POST method to the resource

mission.name: No Backend
mission.description: Method exists but has no integration — request returns empty 200
mission.objective: Add Lambda proxy integration: `aws apigateway put-integration`

mission.name: Wrong Lambda
mission.description: Integration exists but Lambda ARN points to non-existent function
mission.objective: Fix the URI in the integration to use the correct Lambda ARN

mission.name: API Can't Invoke Lambda
mission.description: Integration is correct but API Gateway can't invoke Lambda — missing resource policy
mission.objective: Add Lambda permission: `aws lambda add-permission` for `apigateway.amazonaws.com`

mission.name: API Not Live
mission.description: API is fully configured but never deployed to a stage — all requests fail
mission.objective: Deploy the API: `aws apigateway create-deployment --stage-name prod`

mission.name: CORS Error
mission.description: API works from CLI but web browser gets CORS error — OPTIONS method and CORS headers not configured
mission.objective: Enable CORS on the resource (add OPTIONS method + response headers)

mission.name: All Requests Throttled
mission.description: Stage has `throttlingBurstLimit: 0` and `throttlingRateLimit: 0` — every request throttled
mission.objective: Update stage settings to allow reasonable throttle limits

mission.name: Authorization Required
mission.description: API requires AWS_IAM authorization but client expects no auth — all requests 403
mission.objective: Change method authorization to `NONE` or provide correct SigV4 headers

mission.name: Garbled Request
mission.description: Mapping template transforms request body but uses wrong field name — Lambda receives null values
mission.objective: Fix the VTL mapping template to correctly map request fields

mission.name: API Key Rejected
mission.description: API requires API key but no usage plan exists associating the key to the stage
mission.objective: Create usage plan, associate API stage, and link API key to usage plan

mission.name: The Blocked Pipeline
mission.description: Lambda role missing `s3:GetObject` AND bucket policy has explicit Deny for Lambda role
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the blocked pipeline.

mission.name: The Silent Chain
mission.description: SNS→SQS→Lambda pipeline: SQS queue policy missing (SNS can't send) + Lambda concurrency is 0
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the silent chain.

mission.name: The Blind System
mission.description: Error metric filter uses wrong pattern + alarm threshold inverted + alarm has no SNS action
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the blind system.

mission.name: Upload Goes Nowhere
mission.description: S3 event notification on wrong bucket + Lambda resource policy missing principal + DLQ not configured
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting upload goes nowhere.

mission.name: The Dead API
mission.description: API deployed to wrong stage + Lambda ARN wrong + CORS missing + throttle is zero
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the dead api.

mission.name: Container Chaos
mission.description: ECS task: execution role missing + wrong ECR image ARN + health check command wrong
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting container chaos.

mission.name: Stream Silence
mission.description: DynamoDB Streams disabled + Lambda event source mapping wrong stream ARN + Lambda role missing `dynamodb:GetRecords`
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting stream silence.

mission.name: Stack Refuses to Update
mission.description: Stack in ROLLBACK_COMPLETE + export name conflict + deletion policy missing on RDS
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting stack refuses to update.

mission.name: The Credential Crisis
mission.description: Secret ARN changed after rotation + Lambda env var has old ARN + IAM policy uses ARN not name
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the credential crisis.

mission.name: The Missing Bridge
mission.description: Assume-role fails: wrong Principal in trust policy + missing ExternalId condition + user missing sts:AssumeRole
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the missing bridge.

mission.name: Security Audit
mission.description: Role has `iam:CreateRole` + `iam:AttachRolePolicy` + `iam:PassRole` — can create admin role and escalate
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting security audit.

mission.name: Data Exposure Incident
mission.description: S3 bucket has public access block disabled + bucket ACL is public-read + bucket policy allows `*` principal
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting data exposure incident.

mission.name: Queue Meltdown
mission.description: DLQ ARN wrong in redrive policy + visibility timeout too low + no alarm on DLQ depth
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting queue meltdown.

mission.name: Flying Blind
mission.description: Lambda has no log group + metric filter on wrong log group + alarm period mismatch + no SNS action
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting flying blind.

mission.name: The Unreachable Service
mission.description: ECS task in private subnet + no NAT route + security group blocks 443 egress + execution role missing ecr permission
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the unreachable service.

mission.name: Encryption Lockout
mission.description: KMS key disabled + key policy missing IAM role + Lambda uses hardcoded key ARN (not alias) after rotation
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting encryption lockout.

mission.name: The Auth Maze
mission.description: API Gateway: IAM auth enabled + Lambda permission missing + usage plan throttle is zero + CORS blocks browser
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the auth maze.

mission.name: The Production Incident
mission.description: Complete app stack broken: CloudFormation drift + IAM permission removed + S3 bucket policy expired + Lambda concurrency at 0 + CloudWatch alarm silenced
mission.objective: Diagnose and fix the misconfiguration(s) affecting the production incident.
